name: MoonBae Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Moonbae Steel Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and distribution of steel products. It operates in two segments, Manufacture and Distribution. The Manufacture segment produces hot-rolled steel plates, hot-rolled steel sheets, checkered steel plates, hot-rolled steel coils, thin plates, mini-mill coils, skelps, and others. The Distribution segment distributes its manufactured products through wholesale. Moonbae Steel Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
